---
title: "PASEC Analysis Guide"
output:
  html_document:
    theme: null
    highlight: null
    self_contained: false
    css: null
    df_print: default
---

```{=html}
<script src="https://cdn.tailwindcss.com"></script>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Inter:wght@400;500;600;700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">

<style>
:root {
  --af-navy: #080056;
  --af-card: #0E0C6A;
  --af-cyan: #0DD8F9;
  --af-orange: #FFAD44;
  --af-tagline: #BAB8D0;
  --af-welcome: #0B3954;
  --af-on: #FFFFFF;
  --af-muted: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.72);
  --af-soft: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.48);
  --af-hairline: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.16);
}

html, body {
  margin: 0;
  padding: 0;
  min-height: 100%;
  font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif;
  background-color: var(--af-navy) !important;
  color: var(--af-on);
}

#header,
h1.title,
.title,
.book-header,
.book-summary {
  display: none !important;
}

.book .book-body,
.book .page-inner,
.book .page-wrapper,
.book .section.normal {
  background-color: var(--af-navy) !important;
  border: none !important;
  max-width: none !important;
  padding: 0 !important;
  margin: 0 !important;
}

.book-body {
  margin-left: 0 !important;
}

#pasec-landing {
  min-height: 100vh;
  width: 100%;
  box-sizing: border-box;
  background: var(--af-navy);
}

.af-nav {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 16px;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  padding: 12px 20px;
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--af-hairline);
  background: var(--af-navy);
}

.af-nav-brand {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 10px;
  text-decoration: none;
  color: var(--af-on);
  font-weight: 600;
  font-size: 17px;
}

.af-nav-brand img {
  width: 32px;
  height: 32px;
  object-fit: contain;
  display: block;
}

.af-nav-spacer {
  flex: 1;
  min-width: 8px;
}

.af-search-wrap {
  position: relative;
  min-width: 200px;
  max-width: 280px;
  flex: 1;
}

.af-search {
  width: 100%;
  box-sizing: border-box;
  border: 1px solid var(--af-hairline);
  border-radius: 8px;
  padding: 8px 12px;
  padding-right: 64px;
  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.06);
  color: var(--af-on);
  font-family: inherit;
  font-size: 15px;
  outline: none;
}

.af-search::placeholder {
  color: var(--af-soft);
}

.af-search:focus {
  border-color: var(--af-cyan);
}

.af-search-kbd {
  position: absolute;
  right: 10px;
  top: 50%;
  transform: translateY(-50%);
  font-size: 12px;
  color: var(--af-soft);
  pointer-events: none;
}

.af-search-results {
  display: none;
  position: absolute;
  left: 0;
  right: 0;
  top: calc(100% + 6px);
  z-index: 40;
  background: var(--af-card);
  border: 1px solid var(--af-hairline);
  border-radius: 10px;
  overflow: hidden;
  max-height: 320px;
  overflow-y: auto;
}

.af-search-results.open {
  display: block;
}

.af-search-hit {
  display: block;
  padding: 10px 12px;
  text-decoration: none;
  color: var(--af-on);
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--af-hairline);
}

.af-search-hit:last-child {
  border-bottom: none;
}

.af-search-hit:hover,
.af-search-hit.active {
  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08);
}

.af-search-hit-title {
  font-size: 14px;
  font-weight: 600;
}

.af-search-hit-meta {
  font-size: 12px;
  color: var(--af-soft);
  margin-top: 2px;
}

.af-search-empty {
  padding: 12px;
  font-size: 13px;
  color: var(--af-soft);
}

.af-nav-link {
  color: var(--af-cyan);
  font-weight: 500;
  font-size: 16px;
  text-decoration: none;
}

.af-nav-link-muted {
  color: var(--af-muted);
  font-size: 15px;
  text-decoration: none;
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
}

.af-nav-link-muted:hover {
  color: var(--af-on);
}

.af-nav-github {
  width: 22px;
  height: 22px;
  display: block;
  fill: currentColor;
}

.af-hero {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 1.15fr 0.85fr;
  gap: 32px;
  align-items: center;
  padding: 56px 28px 28px;
}

@media (max-width: 800px) {
  .af-hero {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
    padding: 36px 20px 16px;
  }
  .af-hero-logo {
    order: -1;
    justify-content: flex-start;
  }
}

.af-hero-title {
  margin: 0;
  font-size: clamp(32px, 5vw, 52px);
  font-weight: 700;
  line-height: 1.15;
  letter-spacing: -0.02em;
  color: var(--af-cyan);
}

.af-hero-sub {
  margin: 14px 0 0;
  font-size: clamp(18px, 2.5vw, 28px);
  font-weight: 600;
  line-height: 1.35;
  color: var(--af-on);
}

.af-hero-tag {
  margin: 8px 0 0;
  font-size: 18px;
  font-weight: 600;
  letter-spacing: 0.01em;
  color: var(--af-tagline);
}

.af-hero-logo {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  min-height: 200px;
}

.af-hero-logo img {
  width: min(200px, 55vw);
  height: auto;
  display: block;
  object-fit: contain;
}

.af-features {
  padding: 28px 28px 48px;
}

.af-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(3, minmax(0, 1fr));
  gap: 16px;
}

@media (max-width: 960px) {
  .af-grid {
    grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0, 1fr));
  }
}

@media (max-width: 640px) {
  .af-grid {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  }
  .af-features {
    padding: 20px 16px 40px;
  }
}

.af-card {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  gap: 10px;
  padding: 24px;
  border-radius: 12px;
  border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.14);
  background: var(--af-card);
  text-decoration: none;
  color: inherit;
  height: 100%;
  box-sizing: border-box;
  transition: border-color 0.2s ease;
}

.af-card:hover {
  border-color: var(--af-orange);
}

.af-card-icon {
  width: 40px;
  height: 40px;
  color: var(--af-orange);
}

.af-card-title {
  margin: 0;
  font-size: 18px;
  font-weight: 600;
  color: var(--af-on);
}

.af-card-chip {
  display: inline-flex;
  align-self: flex-start;
  border-radius: 999px;
  padding: 4px 12px;
  border: 1px solid var(--af-hairline);
  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.06);
  font-size: 13px;
  font-weight: 500;
  color: var(--af-muted);
}

.af-card-details {
  margin: 0;
  font-size: 15px;
  line-height: 1.45;
  color: var(--af-muted);
}
</style>

<div id="pasec-landing">

  <header class="af-nav">
    <a class="af-nav-brand" href="index.html">
      <img src="files/AFLEARN-mark-nav.png" alt="AFLEARN" width="32" height="32">
      <span>PASEC Analysis Guide</span>
    </a>
    <div class="af-nav-spacer"></div>
    <div class="af-search-wrap">
      <input id="af-search-input"
             class="af-search"
             type="search"
             placeholder="Search"
             autocomplete="off"
             aria-label="Search the guide"
             aria-controls="af-search-results"
             aria-expanded="false">
      <span class="af-search-kbd" id="af-search-kbd">Ctrl K</span>
      <div id="af-search-results" class="af-search-results" role="listbox"></div>
    </div>
    <a class="af-nav-link" href="index.html">Home</a>
    <a class="af-nav-link-muted"
       href="https://github.com/DataFirst-Courses/pasec-guide"
       target="_blank"
       rel="noopener"
       aria-label="GitHub repository">
      <svg class="af-nav-github" viewBox="0 0 16 16" aria-hidden="true">
        <path d="M8 0C3.58 0 0 3.58 0 8c0 3.54 2.29 6.53 5.47 7.59.4.07.55-.17.55-.38 0-.19-.01-.82-.01-1.49-2.01.37-2.53-.49-2.69-.94-.09-.23-.48-.94-.82-1.13-.28-.15-.68-.52-.01-.53.63-.01 1.08.58 1.23.82.72 1.21 1.87.87 2.33.66.07-.52.28-.87.51-1.07-1.78-.2-3.64-.89-3.64-3.95 0-.87.31-1.59.82-2.15-.08-.2-.36-1.02.08-2.12 0 0 .67-.21 2.2.82.64-.18 1.32-.27 2-.27.68 0 1.36.09 2 .27 1.53-1.04 2.2-.82 2.2-.82.44 1.1.16 1.92.08 2.12.51.56.82 1.27.82 2.15 0 3.07-1.87 3.75-3.65 3.95.29.25.54.73.54 1.48 0 1.07-.01 1.93-.01 2.2 0 .21.15.46.55.38A8.013 8.013 0 0 0 16 8c0-4.42-3.58-8-8-8z"/>
      </svg>
    </a>
  </header>

  <section class="af-hero">
    <div>
      <h1 class="af-hero-title">PASEC Analysis Guide</h1>
      <p class="af-hero-sub">Analysing PASEC 2019 Data in Stata and R</p>
      <p class="af-hero-tag">AFLEARN at DataFirst, UCT</p>
    </div>
    <div class="af-hero-logo">
      <img src="files/AFLEARN-mark.png" alt="AFLEARN" width="200" height="200">
    </div>
  </section>

  <section class="af-features">
    <div class="af-grid" id="card-grid">

      <a class="af-card" href="ch04-download.html" data-category="guide">
        <svg class="af-card-icon" viewBox="0 0 40 40" fill="none" aria-hidden="true">
          <path d="M20 8v16M13 17l7 7 7-7M10 30h20" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2.2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/>
        </svg>
        <h3 class="af-card-title">Download the PASEC Data</h3>
        <span class="af-card-chip">Guide</span>
        <p class="af-card-details">Access datasets, documentation, and supporting resources.</p>
      </a>

      <a class="af-card" href="ch-whats-in-data.html" data-category="guide">
        <svg class="af-card-icon" viewBox="0 0 40 40" fill="none" aria-hidden="true">
          <rect x="8" y="10" width="24" height="20" rx="3" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2.2"/>
          <path d="M8 16h24M14 10v20M20 16v14M26 16v14" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round"/>
        </svg>
        <h3 class="af-card-title">Understanding PASEC Data</h3>
        <span class="af-card-chip">Guide</span>
        <p class="af-card-details">Learn about the assessment design, sample, and dataset structure.</p>
      </a>

      <a class="af-card" href="c02-replicate-weights.html" data-category="concept">
        <svg class="af-card-icon" viewBox="0 0 40 40" fill="none" aria-hidden="true">
          <path d="M20 8v4M12 32h16M14 12h12l2 20H12l2-20z" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2.2" stroke-linejoin="round"/>
        </svg>
        <h3 class="af-card-title">Replicate Weights</h3>
        <span class="af-card-chip">Concept</span>
        <p class="af-card-details">Understand why replicate weights are required and how to use them.</p>
      </a>

      <a class="af-card" href="c03-plausible-values.html" data-category="concept">
        <svg class="af-card-icon" viewBox="0 0 40 40" fill="none" aria-hidden="true">
          <path d="M8 28c4-10 8-14 12-14s8 4 12 14" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2.2" stroke-linecap="round"/>
          <circle cx="20" cy="14" r="3" fill="currentColor"/>
        </svg>
        <h3 class="af-card-title">Plausible Values</h3>
        <span class="af-card-chip">Concept</span>
        <p class="af-card-details">Learn how achievement scores are represented and analysed.</p>
      </a>

      <a class="af-card" href="c06-stata.html" data-category="analysis">
        <svg class="af-card-icon" viewBox="0 0 40 40" fill="none" aria-hidden="true">
          <path d="M10 28V12h6c4 0 7 2.5 7 6.5S20 25 16 25h-6M22 28l8-16M30 28l-8-16" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2.2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/>
        </svg>
        <h3 class="af-card-title">Analysis in Stata</h3>
        <span class="af-card-chip">Analysis</span>
        <p class="af-card-details">Worked examples for common analytical tasks in Stata.</p>
      </a>

      <a class="af-card" href="c07-r.html" data-category="analysis">
        <svg class="af-card-icon" viewBox="0 0 40 40" fill="none" aria-hidden="true">
          <circle cx="18" cy="18" r="9" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2.2"/>
          <path d="M18 9v18M23 22l5 7" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2.2" stroke-linecap="round"/>
        </svg>
        <h3 class="af-card-title">Analysis in R</h3>
        <span class="af-card-chip">Analysis</span>
        <p class="af-card-details">Worked examples for common analytical tasks in R.</p>
      </a>

    </div>
  </section>

</div>

<script>
(function () {
  var destinations = [
    {
      title: "Download the PASEC Data",
      details: "Access datasets, documentation, and supporting resources.",
      href: "ch04-download.html",
      category: "Guide",
      keywords: "download data datasets documentation resources"
    },
    {
      title: "Understanding PASEC Data",
      details: "Learn about the assessment design, sample, and dataset structure.",
      href: "ch-whats-in-data.html",
      category: "Guide",
      keywords: "structure sample assessment microdata whats in the data"
    },
    {
      title: "Replicate Weights",
      details: "Understand why replicate weights are required and how to use them.",
      href: "c02-replicate-weights.html",
      category: "Concept",
      keywords: "jackknife sampling variance weights survey"
    },
    {
      title: "Plausible Values",
      details: "Learn how achievement scores are represented and analysed.",
      href: "c03-plausible-values.html",
      category: "Concept",
      keywords: "scores proficiency imputation achievement pv"
    },
    {
      title: "Analysis in Stata",
      details: "Worked examples for common analytical tasks in Stata.",
      href: "c06-stata.html",
      category: "Analysis",
      keywords: "stata means regression group differences"
    },
    {
      title: "Analysis in R",
      details: "Worked examples for common analytical tasks in R.",
      href: "c07-r.html",
      category: "Analysis",
      keywords: "r rrepest tidyverse regression means"
    },
    {
      title: "Resources for non-French speaking researchers",
      details: "English-language codebook and labelling resources from AFLEARN.",
      href: "ch05-resources.html",
      category: "Guide",
      keywords: "english french codebook labels aflearn resources"
    }
  ];

  var input = document.getElementById("af-search-input");
  var results = document.getElementById("af-search-results");
  var kbd = document.getElementById("af-search-kbd");
  var activeIndex = -1;

  if (/Mac|iPhone|iPad|iPod/.test(navigator.platform)) {
    kbd.textContent = "⌘ K";
  }

  function normalize(s) {
    return (s || "").toLowerCase();
  }

  function search(query) {
    var q = normalize(query).trim();
    if (!q) return [];
    return destinations.filter(function (d) {
      var hay = normalize(d.title + " " + d.details + " " + d.category + " " + d.keywords);
      return hay.indexOf(q) !== -1;
    });
  }

  function render(hits) {
    activeIndex = -1;
    if (!input.value.trim()) {
      results.classList.remove("open");
      input.setAttribute("aria-expanded", "false");
      results.innerHTML = "";
      return;
    }
    if (!hits.length) {
      results.innerHTML = '<div class="af-search-empty">No matching sections</div>';
      results.classList.add("open");
      input.setAttribute("aria-expanded", "true");
      return;
    }
    results.innerHTML = hits.map(function (d, i) {
      return (
        '<a class="af-search-hit" role="option" data-index="' + i + '" href="' + d.href + '">' +
          '<div class="af-search-hit-title">' + d.title + '</div>' +
          '<div class="af-search-hit-meta">' + d.category + " · " + d.details + '</div>' +
        '</a>'
      );
    }).join("");
    results.classList.add("open");
    input.setAttribute("aria-expanded", "true");
  }

  function setActive(next) {
    var hits = results.querySelectorAll(".af-search-hit");
    if (!hits.length) return;
    activeIndex = (next + hits.length) % hits.length;
    hits.forEach(function (el, i) {
      el.classList.toggle("active", i === activeIndex);
    });
    hits[activeIndex].scrollIntoView({ block: "nearest" });
  }

  input.addEventListener("input", function () {
    render(search(input.value));
  });

  input.addEventListener("keydown", function (e) {
    var hits = results.querySelectorAll(".af-search-hit");
    if (e.key === "ArrowDown") {
      e.preventDefault();
      setActive(activeIndex + 1);
    } else if (e.key === "ArrowUp") {
      e.preventDefault();
      setActive(activeIndex - 1);
    } else if (e.key === "Enter" && activeIndex >= 0 && hits[activeIndex]) {
      e.preventDefault();
      window.location.href = hits[activeIndex].getAttribute("href");
    } else if (e.key === "Escape") {
      results.classList.remove("open");
      input.setAttribute("aria-expanded", "false");
      input.blur();
    }
  });

  document.addEventListener("keydown", function (e) {
    var meta = e.metaKey || e.ctrlKey;
    if (meta && (e.key === "k" || e.key === "K")) {
      e.preventDefault();
      input.focus();
      input.select();
    }
  });

  document.addEventListener("click", function (e) {
    if (!e.target.closest(".af-search-wrap")) {
      results.classList.remove("open");
      input.setAttribute("aria-expanded", "false");
    }
  });
})();
</script>
```
